lines.text: This place… Looks like it used to be a smithy.
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I

lines.text: Really? But I've never seen you use it. Did you treasure it that much?
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I

lines.text: The Lion Beast and a girl... Could this be the moment when Ephor Augusta hunted it down?
lines.quest_name: Dream of A Rusted Sword: Part I
